---
title: 'catalog list'
aliases:
  - /api_reference/cli/catalog/ls.html
---

List all entries in the catalog.

## Usage

```bash
xorq catalog list [OPTIONS]
```

## Options

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--kind` / `--no-kind` | `--no-kind` | Print a second column showing each entry's kind (e.g. `Source`, `UnboundExpr`, `Composed`). |

## Examples

```bash
# Names only (one per line)
xorq catalog list

# Names with kind column (tab-separated)
xorq catalog list --kind
```

## See also

- [`catalog list-aliases`](list-aliases.qmd) — list registered aliases
- [`catalog show`](show.qmd) — show full metadata for an entry
- [`catalog schema`](schema.qmd) — show schema for an entry
